name: mathread
description: Local provenance-first PDF capture service and browser shim

scripts.build: rm -rf dist/extension && cp -r vendor/pdfjs dist/extension && bun build ./extension/mathread/background.ts ./extension/mathread/capture-ui.ts ./extension/mathread/link-origin.ts --outdir dist/extension/mathread --target browser && bun run extension/build.ts
scripts.dev: bun run build && bun build --watch ./extension/mathread/background.ts ./extension/mathread/capture-ui.ts ./extension/mathread/link-origin.ts --outdir dist/extension/mathread --target browser
